nasb.text: Now God gave Solomon wisdom and very great discernment and breadth of mind, like the sand that is on the seashore.

esv.text: And God gave Solomon wisdom and understanding beyond measure, and breadth of mind like the sand on the seashore,

cnv.text: 神賜給所羅門智慧、極大的聰明和廣大的心，好像海邊的沙那樣無限無量。

ccb.text: 上帝赐予所罗门无比的智慧、悟性和渊博的学识。
